title: Clashes as thousands protest in Geneva ahead of G7 summit in France
summary_full: Thousands had turned out in the Swiss city, to protest against the gathering of top world leaders, which starts across Lake Geneva in France on Monday
summary_public: Thousands had turned out in the Swiss city, to protest against the gathering of top world leaders, which starts across Lake Geneva in France on Monday

CH.label: neutral
CH.evidence: thousands protest in Geneva ahead of G7 summit
